fixture.description: A plain HashMap field is mutated concurrently from executor-pool threads (warmUp submits put tasks) with no synchronization -> data race, possible lost updates or infinite loop on resize.

grader.rubric: PASS if the report flags that `entries` is a non-thread-safe java.util.HashMap mutated concurrently from the ExecutorService tasks submitted in warmUp (and read by get) with no synchronization -> data race / lost updates / possible corrupted internal state on concurrent resize, and recommends ConcurrentHashMap or external synchronization. Severity IMPORTANT or CRITICAL. FAIL if the concurrent-access / thread-safety problem is not surfaced.

expected_behavior: Bugs/Security agent flags concurrent HashMap mutation
expected_not_behavior: Does NOT claim the single-threaded path is buggy in isolation
